full_name: Aluminum Alloy, Sheet and Plate, 5.6Zn-2.5Mg-1.6Cu-0.23Cr (7075; -T6 Sheet, -T651 Plate), Solution and Precipitation Heat Treated
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: 7075 aluminum alloy sheet and plate in the -T6/-T651 tempers for high-strength aerospace structural applications.

chemical_composition.note: Limiting composition of 7075 aluminum as widely published by independent sources (Aluminum Association, MatWeb); values in wt%.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical room-temperature properties in the -T6 temper, from independent datasheets.

license_note: Alloy composition/property data for 7075 aluminum is widely published by independent free sources (Aluminum Association, MatWeb, ASM). Not reproduced from the copyrighted AMS document; AMS 4045 designation used only as an identifier.
